public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as road census clerk.
manner: Treats loose talk like evidence waiting to harden into record and listens for contradiction before charm. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a road census clerk still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of road census clerk in and around Soreheim Alliance, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Soreheim Alliance workable through the obligations of road census clerk while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around Soreheim Alliance, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of road census clerk visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Korin Stonecarve can trade precise, actionable information once the party secures or clarifies the record they protect.
Korin Stonecarve needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Soreheim Alliance.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Korin Stonecarve communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Soreheim Alliance: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague
